creator: bryan@shatow.net
text:
The security/p5-OpenCA-OpenSSL port was added with no distinfo. I downloaded the version from the upstream [1] and created the distinfo from that.

[1] http://search.cpan.org/dist/OpenCA-OpenSSL/

Fix: Patch adds proper distinfo.
How-To-Repeat: 	make -C /usr/ports/security/p5-OpenCA-OpenSSL checksum
